name: Scuffle Scoundrels
developer: Moped Games, Random Dragon Games, Nerve Damage Games
short_description: Scuffle Scoundrels is an oldschool arcade brawler for 2-to-4 rivals of all ages. With explosive powerups, deadly hazards, and imposing animal captains, it's sink or be sunk in this fast paced pirate romp!
detailed_description:
LET'S SCUFFLE

  • A 2-minutes free-for-all mode - hectic, scallywagging action!
  • A sudden death tiebreaker for settling the score
  • 4 dazzling captains, each commandeering their own unique ship
  • 3 hazardous obstacles and 3 potent powerups pop up at the worst/best times
  • A swashbuckling original soundtrack by composer Morten Gildberg




MEET THE SCOUNDRELS

  • Green captain Haima, noble heir to a once mighty pirate dynasty
  • Purple captain Ngisi, mysterious hunter of relics and powers from beyond this realm
  • Red captain Aldha, smarmy and wealthy pirate merchant
  • Yellow captain Leowin, a fierce renegade admiral, proud and majestic




BEWARE THE DANGERS OF THE SEA

  • Seaweeds slow you way down, leaving you a sitting duck to your competitors
  • Mines blow you to smithereens on impact
  • A giant maelstrom sends you on a whirling voyage to the bottom of the ocean




GRAB TREASURE CHESTS TO LOAD UP

  • Explosive cannon balls launch a devastating shockwave on impact, even when landing in water
  • Rapidfire cannon balls let you hold the fire button to launch projectiles at a terrifying pace
  • Chainshot cannon balls fan out to hit a larger area, assisting your aim greatly



About the Game



Scuffle Scoundrels is an arcade brawler for 2-to-4 rival captains of all ages.
As you can only fire from your broadsides in this game, you must flank your friends or family members to let them taste the hot end of your cannon.

It's a toony explosion of colorful fun, with devastating powerups, deadly hazards, and whimsical captains from all four corners of the world.

The game is playable with all fully PC-compatible controllers, though we currently recommend the X-Box variety.
